text: I'm unable to log in to my account since yesterday. It just keeps loading.
I can't believe how long it's taking to get my issue resolved! I'm really frustrated right now with no updates on my ticket. Can someone please help?!

I seem to be encountering an issue with the software, but I can't provide specific details on what is happening. It just doesn't seem to function as expected. Can someone please assist me with this? Thank you.
my app keeps crashing?? like every time I try to open it! idk what’s wrong. help!
Hey, I was wondering if there's a way to link my old account to my new one? I can't find much info on this.
I can't log into my account, but also, I think the weather is nice today.
I’m really upset because I ordered a blue shirt and received a red one. This isn’t what I wanted at all!

Hello, I hope you can assist me with this little issue I have. It seems there was an unexpected charge on my account for a service I didn’t actually use this month, just like last month. I would really appreciate it if you could look into this and maybe help me with getting that money back, if possible. Thank you very much!
I'm really worried that I can't access my account anymore. I've reset my password, but it still says my account doesn't exist. Can you please help me figure this out? It's really stressing me out.
I updated my email, but somehow I still get codes to the old one, which is confusing.

I recently received a product that I had ordered, but it was not what I had expected at all. I was hoping to get a full refund, yet the website says I can't return it because I opened the packaging, which seems odd since I never intended to keep it. Can I please get some clarity on how to initiate the refund process despite these limitations? It's really confusing, and I'm a bit frustrated because I thought your policy was more flexible than that.
I’m really frustrated! My package arrived late and it’s not even what I ordered—how does that happen? I thought I was getting a phone stand, but instead, it’s a water bottle. Like, seriously???

Hey, so I tried changing my account email like it said to do if you wanna get the updates and now I'm just not getting any of the verification codes on that new email. It's really frustrating since I thought I did everything right. Can you help me figure out why this is happening? I need to get back into my account ASAP!
I can't log in to my account, but I don't remember changing my password. Can you check if it's still the same?
Hey, quick question! How do I update my billing info on the app?
I’m really frustrated with how long it's taking to get help. I expected better service.
